questions.question_html: Which of the following letters does not have any line of symmetry?

options.explanation: N has zero line of symmetry.

questions.question_html: If B is the image of A in the line l and D is the image of C in the line l, then AC = ________.
A circle has only 8 lines of symmetry.

options.explanation: False. A circle has infinite lines of symmetry.

questions.question_html: Write the letters of the word ALGEBRA which have no line of symmetry.
questions.solution_html: The letters L, G and R have no line of symmetry.

questions.solution_html: The figure can be completed as shown in fig, by drawing the points symmetric to different corners(points) with respect to line l.

options.explanation: it is not symmetric with any lines.

questions.question_html: The number of lines of symmetry in a scalene triangle is

options.explanation: The scalene triangle doesn't have any lines of symmetry.

questions.question_html: The number of lines of symmetry in a circle is

options.explanation: A circle has infinite lines of symmetry because it can be folded in any diameter.

questions.question_html: Which of the following letters does not have the vertical line of symmetry?

options.explanation: E has one horizontal line of symmetry.

questions.question_html: Which of the following letters have both horizontal and vertical lines of symmetry?

Which of the following letters does not have any line of symmetry?

  1. M
  2. S
  3. K
  4. H

options.explanation: S has no lines of symmetry.

The number of lines of symmetry in a ruler is

options.explanation: The ruler is mostly rectangle in shape, so it has two lines of symmetry.

questions.question_html: The number of lines of symmetry in a divider is

options.explanation: As divider is like "inverted V", so lines of symmetry in a divider = 1

questions.question_html: The number of line of symmetry in compasses is
The number of lines of symmetry in a protractor is

options.explanation: Since a protractor has a shape of semi-circle and a semi-circle has one line of symmetry.

questions.question_html: The number of lines of symmetry in a 45o - 45o - 90o set-square is

options.explanation: Since, 45° - 45° - 90° set-square is of the shape of an isosceles triangle and it has only one line of symmetry.

questions.question_html: The number of lines of symmetry in a 30o - 60o - 90o set-square is

options.explanation: Since a 30o - 60o - 90o set square has a shape of a scalene triangle and a scalene triangle has no line of symmetry.

questions.question_html: The distance of the image of a point (or an object) from the line of symmetry (mirror) is ________ as that of the point (object) from the line (mirror).
The number of lines of symmetry in a picture of Taj Mahal is ________.
The number of lines of symmetry in a rectangle and a rhombus is ________ (equal/unequal).
The number of lines of symmetry in a rectangle and a square are ________ (equal/unequal).
If a line segment of length 5 cm is reflected in a line of symmetry (mirror), then its reflection (image) is a ________ of length ________.
Fill in the blank: If an angle of measure 80o is reflected in a line of symmetry, then the reflection is an ________ of measure ________.
The image of a point lying on a line l with respect to the line of symmetry l lies on ________.
The number of lines of symmetry in the figure is ________.
The digits having only two lines of symmetry are ________ and ________.
The digit having only one line of symmetry is ________.
The number of digits having no line of symmetry is ________.
The number of capital letters of the English alphabets having an only vertical line of symmetry is ________.
The number of capital letters of the English alphabets having only horizontal line of symmetry is ________.
The number of capital letters of the English alphabets having both horizontal and vertical lines of symmetry is ________.
The number of capital letters of the English alphabets having no line of symmetry is ________.
The line of symmetry of a line segment is the ________ bisector of the line segment.
The number of lines of symmetry in a regular hexagon is ________.
The number of lines of symmetry in a regular polygon of n sides is ________.
A protractor has ________ line/lines of symmetry.
A 30o - 60o - 90o set-square has ________ line/lines of symmetry.
A 45o - 45o - 90o set-square has ________ line/lines of symmetry.
A rhombus is symmetrical about ________.
A rectangle is symmetrical about the lines joining the ________ of the opposite sides.
A right triangle can have at most one line of symmetry.

options.explanation: True. A right triangle can have at most one line of symmetry if its remaining two angles are equal.

questions.question_html: A kite has two lines of symmetry.

options.explanation: False. Because a kite has only one line of symmetry.

questions.question_html: A parallelogram has no line of symmetry.

options.explanation: True

questions.question_html: If an isosceles triangle has more than one line of symmetry, then it need not be an equilateral triangle.

options.explanation:
False
Since, isosceles triangle is symmetrical about the bisector of the angle included between the equal sides, i.e., only one line of symmetry.
{tex}\therefore{/tex} If it has more than one line of symmetry then it must be an equilateral triangle.

questions.question_html: If a rectangle has more than two lines of symmetry, then it must be a square.

options.explanation: True

questions.question_html: If an isosceles triangle has more than one line of symmetry, then it must be an equilateral triangle.

options.explanation: True

questions.question_html: A square and a rectangle have the same number of lines of symmetry.

options.explanation: False. A square has 4 lines of symmetry whereas the rectangle has 2 lines of symmetry.

questions.question_html: A circle has only 16 lines of symmetry.

options.explanation: False. Since a circle is symmetrical about each of its diameters. So it has infinite lines of symmetry.

questions.question_html: A 45o - 45o - 90o set-square and a protractor have the same number of lines of symmetry.

options.explanation: True. Since, both 45o - 45o - 90o set-square and protractor have only one line of symmetry.

questions.question_html: A regular octagon has 10 lines of symmetry.

options.explanation:
False
Since, a regular octagon has 8 sides.
{tex}\therefore{/tex} It must have 8 lines of symmetry.

questions.question_html: Is there any line of symmetry in the figure? If yes, draw all the lines of symmetry.
questions.solution_html: Yes, the given figure has one line of symmetry.

questions.question_html: In figure, PQRS is a rectangle. State the lines of symmetry of the rectangle.
questions.solution_html:
As we know that a rectangle has two lines of symmetry, which are obtained by joining the midpoints of opposite sides.
{tex}\therefore{/tex} The given figure shows that AC and BD are the lines of symmetry.

questions.question_html: Write the letters of the word MATHEMATICS which have no line of symmetry.
questions.solution_html: The letter S of the given word have no line of symmetry.

questions.question_html: Write the number of lines of symmetry in each letter of the word SYMMETRY.
questions.solution_html: S and R have no line of symmetry whereas all the remaining letters have only one line of symmetry.

questions.question_html:
Match the following:

Shape Number of lines of symmetry
(a) Isosceles triangle (i) 6
(b) Square (ii) 5
(c) Kite (iii) 4
(d) Equilateral triangle (iv) 3
(e) Rectangle (v) 2
(f) Regular hexagon (vi) 1
(g) Scalene triangle (vii) 0

Open your geometry box. There are some drawing tools. Observe them and complete the following table: 

Name of the tool  Number of lines of symmetry
(i) The Ruler _______
(ii) The Divider _______
(iii) The Compasses _______
(iv) The Protractor _______
(v) Triangular piece with two equal sides _______
(vi) Triangular piece with unequal sides _______
questions.solution_html:
1. The ruler has 2 lines of symmetry.
  2. The divider has 1 line of symmetry.
  3. The compasses has no line of symmetry.
  4. The protractor has 1 line of symmetry.
  5. Triangular piece with two equal sides has 1 line of symmetry.
  6. Triangular piece with unequal sides has no line of symmetry.
